title: Webox Provider Preset (v1)
description: Schema for Webox provider presets. A preset is a host-specific configuration bundle that augments a hosting-panel adapter (provider_type) with concrete runtime, paths, restart strategy, SSL strategy, probe commands, known risks, and verification metadata. See docs/providers/preconfiguration-vision.md.

schema_version.description: Preset schema version. Hard-coded to 1 in v0.2 baseline; bumped only via ADR + migration tool.

id.description: Stable preset identifier. Lowercase ASCII, dash-separated, e.g. 'cpanel-generic', 'smallhost-devil', 'directadmin-hitme-pl'. Used as filename stem in assets/provider-presets/<id>.json.

display_name.description: Human-readable label shown in TUI Provider Catalog and CLI.

provider_type.description: The HostingProvider adapter type this preset binds to. Must match an adapter registered in providers/. Current: smallhost, mock; v0.2+: cpanel, directadmin, cyberpanel.

status.description: Preset lifecycle status. See preconfiguration-vision.md §8.1: research (public sources only), candidate (test account, partial fixtures), verified (full fixtures + manual checklist), deprecated (panel/runtime changed), community (external maintainer).

markets.description: ISO-3166 alpha-2/alpha-3 country codes or 'global'. Used by Provider Catalog regional grouping.

api.description: Primary control-plane protocol. ssh_only = no panel API, all operations through SSH commands.

api_port.description: TCP port for panel API endpoint. Optional when api=ssh_only or none.

ssh_required.description: Whether the preset assumes SSH access. Webox always prefers SSH for tail/restart, but some panels expose enough via API alone.

node_runtime.description: Node.js runtime mechanism. Common values: passenger, cloudlinux_selector, application_manager, nginx_unit, pm2, systemd_user, manual_pm2, nodecyber, devil, static_only, unknown.

restart_method.description: How Webox restarts the application. Common values: passenger, pm2, systemd, devil, ssh_signal, none, dangerous_global.

ssl_provider.description: SSL issuance mechanism. Common values: autossl, letsencrypt, devil, manual, none.

safe_restart.description: True when restart only affects this app (Passenger restart-app, pm2 reload). False when restart is server-wide (OLS reload). Drives the 'Safe Restart' badge in Provider Catalog.

deploy_path_template.description: Filesystem path template for the deploy target. Placeholders: {{user}}, {{app_root}}, {{domain}}. No shell metacharacters.

probes.description: Documentation-only probe commands. NOT executed in v0.2 baseline; future probe execution (Sprint 17/18+) uses an explicit allowlist + exec.Command with separate args, never sh -c. Pattern excludes shell metacharacters (;, |, &, $, `, >, <).

known_risks.description: Free-form English notes about edge cases, hoster-specific gotchas, or capability disablement. Surfaces in Provider Catalog detail panel.

sources.description: Public documentation references. HTTPS-only. No tracking URLs.

fixture_dir.description: Path inside testing/fixtures/ where this preset's fixtures live. Empty for status=research.

last_verified_at.description: ISO-8601 date of last manual verification (YYYY-MM-DD). Empty for status=research.

verified_by.description: GitHub handle or external maintainer attribution. Empty for status=research.
